update.releaseNotes:
v5.8.0 - Changelog
New --- - Add an analytics dashboard to the `Remote Log Viewer` that charts various statistics from the run. - Add a `Maximum Extra Races` slider to the `Smart Race Solver` page that caps how many extra races the solver can schedule beyond the mandatory ones. - Add a `Maximum Consecutive Races` cap to the `Smart Race Solver` page to control the solver from scheduling too many races in a row. - Add an internal storage fallback to the first-run setup so it can proceed when no document picker is available.
Adjustments --- - Update Automation Library version to `2.5.8` to fix a rare concurrency crash with Tesseract OCR. - Reorganize the `Smart Race Solver` settings into a `General` section. - Make the `Scenario Overrides Settings` sections collapsible.
Fixes --- - Fix the `Smart Race Solver` tapping the wrong same-track race by telling them apart by fan count. - Fix mandatory races like the Debut Race not being retried whenever possible. - Fix `Prioritize Skill Hints` executing trainings without properly checking the failure chance.
